title: Everlasto Plaited Jute Sash Cord with Strong Polypropylene Core No.5 (7mm) x 100M
features: No.5 Everlasto Plaited Jute Sash Cord - 100M
Made with a plaited jute outer and poly core for strength.
Ideal for use with sash windows, as a pulley line or in general DIY.
A quality Everlasto product from James lever of Bolton.
description: 100m - Everlasto No.5 plaited jute sash cord 7mm (approx). a superior quality plaited jute sash cord made with a strong polypropylene core and plaited jute outer. Jute fibres are tough and hard wearing and do not shrink when wet. Ideal for use primarily with sash windows but can also be used with ceiling airers, as a pulley line or washing line. Break strain - 180kg (approx). Made in the the UK by James lever of Bolton - ropes and twines since 1856.
